description: Note in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe addressed to "al-Nezer" (Natan b. Shemuʾel) asking him to send a note to Abū l-[...] instructing him to "check/investigate" [...] of "the woman" and "all of her affairs." Dating: ca. 1128–1138 based on the years when the sender (ca. 1100–1138) and recipient (ca 1128–1164) were active. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
